Name: ID
Description: The GUID id of the record

Name: Active
Description: Boolean values to indicate if the reason code is still active

Name: Code
Description: Code of the reason of cancellation of the subscription

Name: Created
Description: Date and time of the creation of the reason of cancellation of the subscription record

Name: Creator
Description: GUID id of the user that created the reason of cancellation of the subscription

Name: CreatorFullName
Description: Full name of the user that created the reason of cancellation of the subscription

Name: CustomField
Description: Custom field endpoint. Provided only for the Exact Online Premium users.

Name: Description
Description: The description written for the cancellation of the subscription

Name: Division
Description: The division that the record was created in

Name: Modified
Description: The date and time the record was modified

Name: Modifier
Description: Guid id of the user that modified the reason of cancellation of the subscription record

Name: ModifierFullName
Description: Full name of the user that modified the reason of cancellation of the subscription record

Name: Notes
Description: Remarks written link to the reason of cancellation of the subscription
